text:
Gabby Start is the underground hyperpop princess you NEED on your playlist right now. With glitchy beats and raw, chaotic energy, her music feels like a high-speed crash between existential dread and euphoria. She’s serving unfiltered feels, backed by jagged production that screams DIY but hits like pro-level sound design. Let’s break down some of her tracks and the vibes they’re bringing, so you can catch up before everyone else is raving about her.

\- Boys: Gabby goes full-on OBSESSED here, spilling her guts over a warped and hypnotic beat. Lyrics like "I’m obsessed with the boys" hit like a mantra for spiraling. The whole track feels like being stuck in your head at 2 a.m., overthinking every text and glance from your crush. Add in the gritty production, and it’s like an emotional meltdown wrapped in a hyperpop dreamscape. Gabby’s vocals are pleading, almost desperate, like she’s clawing through the noise to get her point across. listen here 💔🌀🔥
\=> <https://open.spotify.com/track/7fwG4dJnvzUmFBguGsGznZ>

\- Optifine: The energy here is FAST. Gabby’s all about the rush, with lyrics like "fast like Optifine" capturing that hyper-digital, overstimulated vibe. It’s giving party anxiety, a little chaos, and a whole lot of FOMO. The repeating line "you acting real crazy" plays like an echo of every night out that spiraled. The beat is jittery and relentless, mirroring the lyrics' tension between wanting to vibe and needing to escape. listen here 💃⚡🌈
\=> <https://open.spotify.com/track/2gR89mZ6dRsw13JlcJAjPZ>

\- Rock Music: This one’s for the overthinkers and existential queens. Gabby’s lyrics "pretending that we’re nothing but friends" and "you’re only here for the night" hit deep. It’s that late-night, looking-for-meaning-in-a-hopeless-place energy. The production leans more raw and grungy, reflecting the lyrical themes of fleeting connections and self-doubt. Gabby’s delivery feels personal, like she’s calling you out for not being real with yourself. listen here 💔🎸🖤
\=> <https://open.spotify.com/track/0QU3VTMzBkx6Jyv9cgUaVh>

Gabby Start’s vibe is messy but intentional, chaotic yet calculated. Her tracks dig into the complexities of love, obsession, and identity, all while serving beats that make you wanna cry in the club. With less than twelve thousand followers on Spotify, she’s criminally underrated, but trust—this girl is on the brink of blowing up. Dive into her world, and prepare to get your emotions shredded. 💅💔🌀
